acceptedIds: Iowa driver's license or non-driver ID
Iowa voter ID card (free from county auditor)
exceptions: Without acceptable photo ID, voter may sign an affidavit or cast a provisional ballot. First-time voters without ID may sign an oath.
provisionalBallotRules: Provisional ballot available; voter has until the day before the canvass to provide ID.
phonesAtPollsDetail: No use of electronic devices while in voting booth.
